questions.question: Which Article of the Indian Constitution grants fundamental rights to Indian citizens?
questions.explanation: It deals with equality and non-discrimination.

questions.question: The Panchayati Raj system is closely related to which provision of the West Bengal Panchayat Act?
options: Section 3 of the West Bengal Panchayat Act
questions.explanation: It deals with the three-tier Panchayat system.

questions.question: The concept of Judicial Review is derived from which provision of the Indian Constitution?
questions.explanation: It provides for the power of the Supreme Court to review laws and actions.

questions.question: The West Bengal State Election Commission is responsible for the conduct of which type of elections?
questions.explanation: It is responsible for conducting elections to the three-tier Panchayat system.

questions.question: Which Article of the Indian Constitution deals with the Directive Principles of State Policy?
questions.explanation: It provides guidance to the state for the well-being of its citizens.

questions.question: Which river is the main water source of the Sundarbans?
questions.explanation: The Ganges River is the main water source of the Sundarbans.

questions.question: Which of the following mountains is located in the Eastern Himalayas of West Bengal?
questions.explanation: The Kangchenjunga mountain is located in the Eastern Himalayas of West Bengal.

questions.question: Which of the following rivers flows through the Darjeeling Himalayan hill region?
questions.explanation: The Tista River flows through the Darjeeling Himalayan hill region.

questions.question: Which of the following islands is located off the coast of West Bengal?
questions.explanation: The Narcondam Island is located off the coast of West Bengal.

questions.question: Which of the following mountain passes is located on the Sikkim-Bhutan border?
questions.explanation: The Nathu La Pass is located on the Sikkim-Bhutan border.

questions.question: Which of the following is a flagship scheme of West Bengal government for providing housing to the urban poor?
questions.explanation: Bangla Abas Yojana provides housing to the urban poor in West Bengal.

questions.question: What is the name of the West Bengal government's scheme for providing financial assistance to farmers for crop insurance?
questions.explanation: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers for crop insurance in West Bengal.

questions.question: Which of the following schemes is launched by the West Bengal government for promoting entrepreneurship among the youth?
questions.explanation: The scheme promotes entrepreneurship among the youth in West Bengal.

questions.question: What is the name of the West Bengal government's scheme for providing free education to girls from economically backward families?
questions.explanation: The scheme provides free education to girls from economically backward families in West Bengal.

questions.question: Which of the following schemes is launched by the West Bengal government for providing financial assistance to the elderly for their healthcare?
questions.explanation: The scheme provides financial assistance to the elderly for their healthcare in West Bengal.

questions.question: At a rate of 7.5% per annum compound interest, how much will Rs. 9,000 become after 2 years?
questions.explanation: Using the formula A = P(1 + r/100)^n.

questions.question: An amount becomes Rs. 5,000 in 4 years at compound interest rate of 5% per annum. What was the principal amount?
questions.explanation: Using the formula A = P(1 + r/100)^n.

questions.question: What is the simple interest on a sum of Rs. 7,000 at 9% per annum for 3 years?
questions.explanation: Using the formula SI = (P * r * t)/100.

questions.question: The simple interest on Rs. 12,000 at 6% per annum for 2 years is Rs. 1,440. What is the amount after 2 years?
questions.explanation: Adding the principal amount with the simple interest.

questions.question: A sum of Rs. 10,000 is invested at 8% per annum compound interest. What will be the amount after 5 years?
questions.explanation: Using the formula A = P(1 + r/100)^n.

questions.question: A pipe can fill 1/4th of a tank in 1 hour. If 3 such pipes are used, then the time taken to fill the tank will be?
questions.explanation: Using 3 pipes will fill 3/4th of the tank in 1 hour.

questions.question: A man can finish 1/2 of a work in 2 days. How many days will he take to finish the whole work?
questions.explanation: Since he can finish half the work in 2 days, he will finish the whole work in 3 days.

questions.question: In a school, 12 students can clean the school in 8 hours. How many students are needed to clean the school in 6 hours?
questions.explanation: Since 12 students can clean the school in 8 hours, 16 students will be needed to clean it in 6 hours.

questions.question: A worker can complete 1/5th of a job in 4 hours. How many hours will he take to complete 3/5th of the job?
questions.explanation: Since he can complete 1/5th of the job in 4 hours, he will complete 3/5th of the job in 12 hours.

questions.question: A pump can fill a tank in 3 hours. However, a pipe also fills the tank in 6 hours. If both the pump and the pipe are opened together, then the time taken to fill the tank will be?
questions.explanation: Together, they will fill 1/3rd of the tank in 1 hour and 1/6th of the tank in 1 hour.

questions.question: Which of the following represents the correct decoding of the word 'মহামায়া'?
questions.explanation: It is the correct Bengali word.

questions.question: In the given series 3, 5, 8, 12, 17, 23, ?, the pattern is:
questions.explanation: The pattern involves adding consecutive increments.

questions.question: Which of the following is the correct code for the word 'Bengal'?
questions.explanation: It is a standard alphabetical coding.

questions.question: Which of the following series follows the pattern of addition and subtraction?
questions.explanation: It involves alternating addition and subtraction.

questions.question: Which of the following represents the correct decoding of the word 'মৃত্যু'?
questions.explanation: It is the correct Bengali word.

questions.question: Rashmi is the daughter of Kalyani. Ramesh is the husband of Kalyani, then who is the father of Rashmi?
questions.explanation: Rashmi's father is Kalyani's husband.

questions.question: Sudipta is the sister of Bimal, then what is the relationship between Sudipta and her daughter, Srijita?
options: Srijita is the mother of Sudipta
Srijita is the daughter of Sudipta's brother
Sudipta is the mother of Srijita
Srijita is the sister of Sudipta
questions.explanation: Sudipta is the mother of Srijita.

questions.question: Bikash and Debjit are brothers. If Bikash's wife is the sister of Debjit's wife, then what is Debjit's relationship with Bikash's wife?
questions.explanation: Debjit's wife is the sister of Bikash's wife.

questions.question: Amit and Pritam are brothers. If Pritam's wife is the daughter of Amit's wife's brother, then what is Amit's wife's relationship with Pritam's wife?
questions.explanation: Amit's wife is the sister of Pritam's wife.

questions.question: Rabindra is the son of Ratan. If Ratan's sister's son is married to Rabindra's daughter, then what is Rabindra's relationship with Rabindra's daughter's husband?
questions.explanation: Rabindra is the father of Rabindra's daughter's husband.
